summary: AI Delay Risk Module - Complete testing of backend API and frontend UI. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend E2E tests passed for risk badges, risk summary counter, colored ring borders, event action panel, and day/week view navigation.

issues: Risk badges not shown in week view - by design, delayRisks state is cleared when switching to week/month view to avoid excessive API calls
Events that overlap in time can intercept hover events from each other - this is a CSS z-index issue with absolutely positioned elements

critical_code_review_comments: Week view risk badges: The code renders RiskBadge in week view (line 858) but delayRisks is cleared when view !== 'day' (line 164). Consider fetching risk data for week view as well if badges should appear there.
seed_data_creation: Test missions were pre-created in fleet_reservations MongoDB collection for date 2026-03-23 with various risk scenarios
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Delay Risk module fully functional. Backend: GET /api/fleet/planning/delay-risk returns risk scores for future events within 2 hours. Risk scoring: overlap (+40), GPS inactive (+20), no driver (+15), margin <10min (+10), ETA>margin (+25). Status classification: on_time (0-39), tight (40-69), at_risk (70-100). Google Distance Matrix integration working with real traffic data. Adaptive caching TTL: >=60min→30min, 20-60min→10min, <20min→5min. Frontend: RiskBadge component shows score%, RiskTooltip shows reasons/ETA/margin/GPS status, colored ring borders (amber for tight, red for at_risk), risk summary counter in header, auto-refresh every 30 seconds. Risk data only fetched for day view (not week/month).

backend_api_tests: Response structure: risks dict, date, bufferMinutes ✓
Risk entry structure: score, status, label, reasons, marginMinutes, etaMinutes, etaText, distanceText, gpsActive ✓
ETA data present when GPS active and pickup address exists ✓
Risk entries correspond to planning events ✓
Risk labels in French (A l'heure, Timing serre, Risque de retard) ✓
frontend_flows: Fleet Login: Navigate to /fleet/login, enter credentials, redirect to dashboard ✓
Planning Navigation: Sidebar 'Planning' link navigates to planning page ✓
Date Navigation: Next/prev buttons change date ✓
Risk Summary Counter: Shows count by status (red/amber/green dots) ✓
Risk Badges on Events: Shows score% with colored background ✓
Colored Ring Borders: Amber ring for tight status, red ring for at_risk ✓
Day View: data-testid='planning-day-view' displays timeline with events ✓
Event Click: Opens action panel with Desaffecter/Reaffecter buttons ✓
Auto-refresh: 30 second interval configured (verified in code) ✓

risk_scoring_verification.overlap_penalty: +40 points when previous mission ends after next mission starts
risk_scoring_verification.gps_inactive_penalty: +20 points when GPS timestamp > 10 minutes old
risk_scoring_verification.tight_margin_penalty: +10 points when margin between missions < 10 minutes

google_distance_matrix_verification.sample_eta: 1 hour 5 mins, 80.2 km (CDG airport from current GPS position)
